title: LagLess Optimized
description: This Modpack will boost your FPS and have smooth gameplay.
body:
### **Attention!**

LagLess Optimized Has Officialy Been Continued. If There Are Any Versions That Are Not In The Version Join Discord And Add A Suggestion.

### **Version 1.21.x or higher requires Java 21. Update your launcher and [download Java here](https://adoptium.net/en-GB/temurin/releases/?version=21&package=jre&arch=x64#version-filter)**

A simple Minecraft Modpack which focuses on performence and graphics enchancements.

### Performence
LagLess Optimized is faster than cmpeteing game clients, thanks to performence mods like Sodium, Lithium and others. The bundled modshave been carefully seletced to be safe in your worlds and provided noticeable speed benefits on any device.

### Feels Familiar
LagLess Optimized includes features that allows you to experience Minecraft just as you remember it, no matter what version you've used before. This means you can use game controllers and many more features.

### Up To Date
LagLess Optimized receives fast updates. Updating the modpack is easy and will preserver your mod settings, where possible. We also make sure to update our modpack as soon as a mod has been updated to its latest version.

### Built on Fabric

LagLess Optimized uses the Fabric Mod Loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods.

# FAQ
> **Q:** What mods does it have?
> 
> **A:** Click on any version and scroll down and on the dependecies it will show you there.

> **Q:** I have more questions!
>
> **A:** [Come and chat with us on Discord!](https://discord.gg/5SaFSYPb5t)

> **Q:** How do I report a bug give feedback about this modpack?
>
> **A:** [Join the Discord and find the **LagLess Optimized** category](https://discord.gg/5SaFSYPb5t)

>**Q:** When will you update the ModPack to its latest version?
>
>**A:** When most of the mods have been updated to its latest version. If you want to get notified when I update the ModPack to its latest version [Join The Discord](https://discord.gg/5SaFSYPb5t](https://discord.gg/5SaFSYPb5t)
